# SOURCE: The Copywriter Blueprint (TCB)

> **Pessoa:** Jon Benson
> **Source ID:** TCB
> **Tipo:** COURSE (8-week live program, 16 sessions)
> **Processado:** 2026-03-23
> **Arquivos:** 67 files (~2.68MB)
> **Elementos extraidos:** 338

---

## VISAO GERAL

The Copywriter Blueprint e o programa de ensino mais abrangente de Jon Benson sobre copywriting de persuasao. Curso de 8 semanas, 16 sessoes ao vivo (2019), cobrindo desde fundamentos de empatia ate tecnicas avancadas de fechamento.

O curso e centrado no **"The Hex"** — um framework de 6 lados de persuasao que cobre:
1. Self-Identifying Avatars + Problems/Complaints + Rapport
2. Mistaken Beliefs + Enemy Creation + Primary Cause
3. Goals (Primary + Secondary) + Persuasion Quadrants
4. False Solutions + Primary Solution/Unique Mechanism
5. USPs + Sales Bullets + Testimonials + Triple Guarantee
6. Calls to Action + Tsunami Close + Samurai PS/Q&A

---

## ESTRUTURA DO PROGRAMA

| Week | Sessions | Tema Principal |
|------|----------|---------------|
| 1 | 01-02 | Empathy Formula, Love Letter Marketing, Persuasion Quadrant, Word Alchemy |
| 2 | 03-04 | HEX Side 1 (Avatars, Complaints, Rapport) + Speedwriting |
| 3 | 05-06 | HEX Side 2 (Mistaken Beliefs, Enemy, Primary Cause) |
| 4 | 07-08 | HEX Side 3 (Goals, Future Pacing, NLP techniques) |
| 5 | 09-10 | HEX Side 4 (False Solutions, Primary Solution, Unique Mechanism) |
| 6 | 11-12 | HEX Side 5 (USPs, Sales Bullets, Testimonials, Triple Guarantee) |
| 7 | 13-14 | HEX Side 6 (CTAs, Tsunami 4-Part Close, Samurai PS/Q&A) |
| 8 | 15-16 | Advanced Q&A, Ethics, Print Ads, CopyPro Academy vision |
| Bonus | - | CopyPro Software Demo, Love Letter Marketing Essay, 4-Day Thyroid VSL Example |

## FRAMEWORKS-CHAVE (TOP 15)

1. **The Hex** — 6-sided persuasion system (avatars → complaints → beliefs → goals → solutions → actions)
2. **Persuasion Quadrant (WNFA)** — Wants, Needs, Fears, Actions overlay for every piece of copy
3. **Empathy Formula (See-Hear-Validate)** — 4-step empathy exercise for copy research
4. **Love Letter Marketing** — 3 elements: Service, Empathy, Hope
5. **Word Alchemy** — Transform basic words into visceral, physically demanding words
6. **Self-Identifying Avatars (SIA)** — 3-tier system (demographic → self-label → epic branded)
7. **Primary Cause/Solution Architecture** — Branded unique mechanism for positioning
8. **Speedwriting 10-Step Method** — 50/10 sets, character mode, avatar-focus
9. **Samurai PS/Q&A** — Leading questions disguised as FAQ (30% conversion bump)
10. **Tsunami 4-Part Close** — Crossroads → Future → Rights → Smarts
11. **Triple Guarantee** — Big Hairy Promise + Easy Peasy + Even The Font
12. **USP 5-Component Formula** — Turn + Medium + Target + Big Promise + Withouts
13. **Sales Bullet 5-Part Formula** — Lead + Verb + Hook + Turn + Close
14. **Chiasmus 5-Point Formula** — Claim → Support → Crux → Invert → Tie-down
15. **5-Point Checklist Guarantee** — Downloadable PDF with future-paced checkpoints

---

## HEURISTICAS NUMERICAS (TOP 15)

| Heuristica | Valor | ID |
|-----------|-------|-----|
| "10% You" Rule | 10% of words should be "you" | HEUR-JB-530 |
| Cold traffic reading level | 4th-5th grade Flesch-Kincaid | HEUR-JB-531 |
| Max sentence length | 15 words | HEUR-JB-532 |
| Avatar name length | 1-3 words max | HEUR-JB-534 |
| Speed writing sets | 50 min write / 10 min rest, max 4 sets | HEUR-JB-539 |
| Editing gap | 24 hours before editing | HEUR-JB-540 |
| Primary solution name | 2 words ideal, 3 max | HEUR-JB-601 |
| USP length | 25 words or less | HEUR-JB-605 |
| Max "withouts" in USP | 3 max | HEUR-JB-606 |
| Minimum testimonials | 3-4 really good ones | HEUR-JB-607 |
| Closes needed to sell | Average 4.5 | HEUR-JB-609 |
| Email sweet spot | 50-180 words (108 avg) | HEUR-JB-641 |
| Email ROI | 38:1 return | HEUR-JB-657 |
| Samurai PS conversion bump | ~30% increase | HEUR-JB-636 |
| Middle-of-story opening | +20% conversions | HEUR-JB-581 |

## RAW FILES

**Localizacao:** `knowledge/external/sources/jon-benson/raw/the-copywriter-blueprint/`

### Tipos de Arquivo:
- **m4a transcriptions** (16 files) — Main session audio transcriptions
- **mp4 transcriptions** (14 files) — Video transcriptions (overlap with m4a)
- **mp4 PreClass/Q&A** (8 files) — Pre-class hangout sessions
- **pdf Slides** (14 files) — Session slide content
- **pdf Week Summaries** (12 files) — Weekly structured notes
- **Supporting Docs** (3 files) — Love Letter essay, Paula Abdul intro, Happy Words
- **Bonus** (2 files) — CopyPro session, 4-Day Thyroid VSL example
- **Course Overview** (1 file) — Full syllabus

### Deduplication:
- m4a and mp4 of same session are near-identical (used larger version per session)
- Session 10 m4a was incomplete (7.6KB) — used mp4 (63KB) instead
- PreClass/Q&A sessions are unique content, not duplicates
